overall.description: First-person exploration of a futuristic cyberpunk nightclub with heavy neon lighting. The player character moves from a back service room through the main club area with bars and seating, past an overlook showing caged dancers below, through a service corridor with vending machines, and down a red-lit staircase. The environment features high-tech industrial aesthetics with dominant red, blue, and purple neon accents characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: service corridor leading to nightclub main floor

events.description: moving from dim back room through doorway into the neon-lit club area
transitioning from dim green lighting to vibrant red and orange neon illumination

agents.ego_description: moving from a service back room through a doorway into the main nightclub floor

notable_agents.action: person in white outfit walking ahead toward the bar area

entered.detail: dark walls covered with colorful stickers and graffiti-style decals
doorway with green neon trim marking the entrance to the club
long curved bar with distinctive orange neon underlighting
vertical panels emitting bright blue light along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow service corridor with sticker-covered walls, moving through a doorway into the main club area. The lighting shifts from dim to vibrant neon as the space opens up to reveal a long bar with orange underlighting on the left and blue neon panels on the right. A person in white walks ahead toward the bar area.

scene_state.functional_zone: main club lounge with bar seating and digital advertisements

events.description: turning left to follow the curve of the bar counter
approaching large illuminated boxing posters on the far wall

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved bar, passing patrons seated on lounge benches

notable_agents.action: person in bright green pants sitting on bar stool facing the counter

entered.detail: booth-style seating with people sitting and conversing
large red illuminated posters advertising boxing matches on the far wall

segments.scene_description: Walking through the main club lounge along the curved bar, passing seated patrons on booth seating to the left. The environment features red neon lighting and large boxing posters on the far wall. Digital advertisement screens glow on the right side while the bar counter curves around to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper balcony overlooking main dance floor with suspended cages

events.description: reaching the balcony overlook with view of the lower dance floor
view opens to reveal suspended cages with dancers above the lower level

agents.ego_description: pausing at the balcony railing to observe the dance floor and suspended cages below

notable_agents.action: dancers performing inside suspended neon-lit cages on the lower level

entered.detail: metal safety railing marking the edge of the upper overlook
neon-lit metal cages hanging from the ceiling containing dancers
lower level of the club with blue neon lighting and moving crowd

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an upper balcony overlooking the main club area. Suspended cages with neon lighting hang above the lower dance floor where dancers perform. The view shows the multi-level nature of the club with blue neon structures on the lower level and crowds moving below the balcony railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: back service corridor with vending machines and restrooms

events.description: entering darker back corridor with purple accent lighting
shifting from red and blue neon to purple glowing lights near vending machines

agents.ego_description: moving through a service corridor past vending terminals and a standing patron

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow jacket standing at a service counter terminal

entered.detail: terminals with distinctive purple glowing cylindrical lights
counter with computer terminals and sticker decorations
doorway with yellow neon trim leading to the stairwell

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the balcony into a darker service corridor with purple lighting. Vending machines with glowing purple cylinders line the right wall while a service counter appears on the left. The space is narrower and less populated than the main club area, leading toward a doorway with yellow neon trim.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stairwell descending to lower level

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow staircase illuminated by red neon strips

entered.detail: narrow descending staircase with red neon strip lighting on walls and steps

segments.scene_description: The final segment descends a narrow stairwell bathed in intense red neon light. The walls and steps are lined with glowing red strips, creating a dramatic contrast to the previous areas. The stairwell is empty and enclosed, leading downward toward a lower level visible at the bottom of the stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped service area through a vibrant, multi-level cyberpunk nightclub and back into a secluded, red-lit descent. It begins in a narrow, sticker-covered corridor before passing through a doorway where the dim light shifts into a vibrant neon expanse featuring a long bar with orange and blue accents. As the camera glides past seated patrons and glowing digital advertisements, the scene opens onto an upper balcony overlooking suspended neon cages and a crowded dance floor below. The perspective then shifts away from the spectacle into a darker, purple-lit service corridor lined with glowing vending machines, moving toward a yellow-trimmed doorway. Finally, the camera descends a narrow, enclosed stairwell bathed in intense red neon strips that lead downward into the depths of the club.
